description: Resolves custom or relative time bounds against the selected Stage Detection well.
sql: SELECT * FROM (WITH bounds AS (SELECT MIN(CAST(w.first_record_ts AS timestamp)) AS first_available_ts, MAX(CAST(w.last_record_ts AS timestamp)) AS last_available_ts FROM featurestore:merged_well_index_v1 w WHERE w.name = :well_name) SELECT CASE WHEN :time_range = 'previous_6h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '6 hours') WHEN :time_range = 'previous_12h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '12 hours') WHEN :time_range = 'previous_48h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '48 hours') WHEN :time_range = 'previous_72h' THEN GREATEST(first_available_ts, last_available_ts - INTERVAL '72 hours') ELSE first_available_ts END AS start_time, last_available_ts AS end_time FROM bounds WHERE first_available_ts IS NOT NULL AND last_available_ts IS NOT NULL) q
